nehajmsr98@gmail.com

Hi, my name is

Neha Gupta.

I build AI that works on its own.

I'm an AI Product Manager with an engineering foundation and an MBA, currently shipping agentic AI products at Supervity. My MBA at BITSoM spans Marketing, E-commerce, and Consumer Behaviour, on top of a B.Tech in Electronics & Communication from VIT, Chennai. I work where deep tech meets product strategy — turning complex AI capabilities into outcomes enterprises can actually trust and use.

Check out my work

01.About Me

I believe the hardest part of building AI isn't the technology — it's keeping people at the center of it. That's the thread that runs through my work.

I lead with empathy — for the users whose workflows I simplify and the teams I build with. But empathy doesn't mean going easy: when I'm handed a problem, I get attentive and demanding, digging into details and holding the work to a high bar. I'm a stickler for the small things, and I read a lot of psychology — understanding how people think makes me better at building things they'll actually use.

What keeps me effective in a field that reinvents itself every few months is a willingness to learn — and unlearn. And off the clock I'm happiest in motion: a state-level badminton player, trained classical dancer, painter, and a new runner who feels alive after a 2K.

02.Where I've Worked

AI Product Manager @ Supervity

2026 — Present · Digitamize, Inc.
Product Strategy
  • Own product strategy and roadmap for agentic AI "Auto Agents / Apps" that automate enterprise workflows end-to-end across Finance, IT, and Customer Experience.
  • Define requirements for multi-agent orchestration on role-based AI Employees with RAG retrieval, agentic OCR, and confidence-based escalation — cutting manual effort ~95%.
Governance & Trust
  • Specify the human-in-command governance layer (plain-English AI policies, audit trails) enabling SOC2/GDPR-aligned oversight and faster enterprise buy-in.
  • Establish AI product KPIs (task-completion, escalation rate, extraction accuracy, adoption) and run experiments to improve agent reliability and reduce hallucination.
Cross-functional Delivery
  • Partner with engineering, design, and customer success to take agentic features from discovery to production, supporting enterprise deployments.

Product / Digital Analytics & Marketing Intern @ Shriram AMC

Apr 2025 — May 2025
GTM Strategy
  • Drove 18.8% CTR by creating 30+ persona-based messages for multi-channel campaigns targeting 8K+ SEBI intermediaries.
  • Surfaced 25+ qualified leads and boosted campaign engagement 2.5× by executing a lead-scoring model in Netcore.
  • Drove conversion 40% via 35+ automated drip sequences using UTM tracking for real-time optimization.
Process Automation
  • Cut manual effort 75% and accelerated compliance 4× by automating 1000+ SEBI reports/month via low-cost AWS.
  • Projected ~30% faster reviews via GenAI summarization & tagging, enabling quick extraction of key fund insights.
  • Built a Power BI dashboard on AMFI data, guiding strategic decisions on AUM growth, NFOs, & scheme distribution.

Technical Consultant Intern @ Tata Steel

Jun 2024 — May 2025
3D Modeling & Digital Twin
  • Modelled high-fidelity 3D point cloud data with >75% accuracy, enabling zero-error plant layout planning and preventing costly rework.
  • Accelerated scanning time 60% through minimal-pass modeling & registration techniques in high-temperature, restricted-access areas.
  • Crafted 3D datasets powering Digital Twin adoption, AR/VR inspections, and AI-driven predictive maintenance for Industry 4.0 readiness.

Senior Software Engineer @ Ford Motor

Jul 2020 — May 2024
New Product Development
  • Achieved 50% boost in operational efficiency by re-engineering a legacy system to a cloud-native (PCF) platform.
  • Developed APIs reducing manual effort 45% (220+ hrs/month), enhancing data refresh from overnight to 15 minutes.
  • Accelerated deployments 67% through Tekton automation, leveraging SonarQube for code-quality checks.
Business Analytics
  • Designed 10+ analytical dashboards visualizing real-time updates on 50K+ orders across 243 EU vehicle markets.
  • Monitored 200+ Autosys batch jobs daily, automating checks to boost efficiency 20% and ensure 80% SLA compliance.
  • Ensured 97% resolution rate for high-priority requests adhering to agile methodology.
Client Value & Quality
  • Rationalized ~₹50L annual savings via Google Cloud's pay-as-you-use migration; secured $240K by mitigating uptime & access risks.
  • Revamped code quality & coverage 90% through SQL-injection validation; reduced vulnerabilities 80% via Spring Security MFA.
Leadership & Recognition
  • Led a team of 5 to improve scalability and reduce latency 60% via multi-region migration; onboarded 4 hires and mentored 11 developers.
  • Automated CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins), reducing release defects 90% and boosting delivery cycles 30%.
  • Awards: APA Award for cloud migration · Asia Pacific Award (Women of Ford) · fast-tracked to "High Tech High Demand" (top ~5% of new hires).
